# mittwald_server (Data Source)

A data source that selects a server by its ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mittwald_server" "example" {
  id = "your-server-id"
}

output "server_machine_type" {
  value = data.mittwald_server.example.machine_type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the server

### Read-Only

- `article_id` (String) The article ID determining the machine type of the server
- `cluster_name` (String) The name of the cluster the server is running on
- `contract_id` (String) The contract ID associated with the server
- `created_at` (String) The time at which the server was created
- `customer_id` (String) ID of the customer the server belongs to
- `description` (String) A human-readable description for the server
- `diskspace_gb` (Number) The amount of disk space for the server, in GiB
- `machine_type` (String) The machine type of the server
- `short_id` (String) The short ID of the server (for example `s-4e7tz3`)
- `status` (String) The current status of the server
